title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 526.110 - Notice to be posted, when
text:
526.110.  Notice to be posted, when. — If he does not reside in the state, and has no known agent or attorney therein, notice shall be put up ten days before the application for the injunction, in the office of the clerk of the circuit court of the county where the proceedings were had.
(RSMo 1939 § 1667) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1503; 1919 § 1953; 1909 § 2518
